# Workers


## What a worker is

Workers are what actually do things. Understanding iii means understanding workers.

_TODO: Consider combining w/ Functions and Triggers into one doc_

## Worker lifecycle states

The states a worker moves through after connecting:
`connecting → connected → available / busy → disconnected`.

## Worker isolation

Workers are intended and designed to be independent processes; one worker crashing does not affect
others.
